heading: Relief of settlers on lands granted in aid of wagon roads
label: 903 Relief of settlers on lands granted in aid of wagon roads
text: The provision of and all statutes amendatory thereof or supplementary thereto, including sections 894 to 899 of this title, as modified or supplemented by sections 900 to 902 of this title, shall apply to grants of land in aid of the construction of wagon roads.section 888 of this title
